game_meta.name: The Finals
game_meta.tagline: 3v3v3v3 (4-team) FPS — stealing cash, defending cashouts, fully destructible environments.
game_meta.round_economy: Build classes have fixed HP and gadget choices. No traditional buy phase.
game_meta.round_format: World Tour: 1 match = multiple rounds (cashout cycles). Tournament: best of multiple matches.
key_mechanics: Build classes: Light (150 HP, max mobility), Medium (250 HP, healer/utility), Heavy (350 HP, tank)
Destructible environment — every wall, floor, and ceiling can be destroyed
Cashout = take an unlocked vault to a Cashout statue, hold 30s to extract
Contest = wait for two teams to fight over Cashout, third-party the winner
Defib (Medium) = revive teammate anywhere on map
Heal Beam (Medium) = sustained healing during fights
Goo Gun (Heavy) = seal entries / glue enemies

sites.name: Casino Vault
sites.team_strategy: Heavy carries vault via rooftop route, Light grapples for vertical picks, Medium heal-beams behind.

sites.name: Strip Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Open Strip = exposed. Heavy commits front, Light flanks via Plaza

sites.name: Penthouse Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Vertical multi-floor hold. Heavy on Cashout, Medium Jump Pad up, Light rooftop SR-84

sites.name: Yacht Vault
sites.team_strategy: Yacht is destructible — Heavy can RPG holes for new entries

sites.name: Plaza Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Open Plaza — Heavy uses Fountain as cover, Light vertical picks

sites.name: Harbor Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Pier rotation route to Harbor. Less contested than Plaza.

sites.name: Mall Vault
sites.team_strategy: Subway tunnel for fast carry. Avoid Streets.

sites.name: Plaza Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Open Plaza — Heavy uses Fountain cover, Light grapples for vertical

sites.name: Temple Vault
sites.team_strategy: Garden cover route, Stream water for fast rotation

sites.name: Plaza Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Plaza open — Heavy uses pillars for cover

sites.name: Rooftop Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Vertical hold — Light grapples for vertical advantage

sites.name: Grid Vault
sites.team_strategy: Digital aesthetic, neon corridors. Heavy mesh-carries between racks

sites.name: Mining Vault
sites.team_strategy: Tight tunnel layout — Heavy uses Mesh Shield + Goo Gun

sites.name: Plaza Cashout
sites.team_strategy: Open Plaza — Heavy uses cover, Light vertical picks

common_mistakes: Solo dives without team cover (150 HP dies fast)
SR-84 holding same angle past first kill
Stun Gun on tank only (wasted on Heavy)
Glitch Grenade in random spots (wastes Defib disable opportunity)
No team coordination on flank timing
Light.ideal_use: Flank back-line with Cloak + Grapple. SR-84 from rooftop. Stun Gun on Medium / Light. Glitch Grenade to disable Defib mid-fight.

Medium.ult: Healing Beam (sustained heal) or Defib chain
common_mistakes: Healing Beam on full HP teammate
Defib on a teammate who's not actually dead
APS Turret in wrong angle (no protection)
No coordination on Defib timing (anticipate vs reactive)
Healing Beam on Light (Light should be flanking, not sustained)
Medium.ideal_use: Heal Beam Heavy through engagements. Defib BEFORE wipe (anticipate). APS Turret on Cashout. Goo Gun for entry seal.

common_mistakes: RPG wasted on Light (Light has 150 HP, easier kill)
Goo Gun on wrong entry (didn't seal)
No coordination on Mesh Shield + carry route
RPG on full HP team (waste on tank)
Heavy.ideal_use: Mesh Shield front + carry vault. RPG for Light / Medium back-line. C4 + Goo Gun for entry seal. Charge 'N' Slam for forced engagements.

bronze: Medium without Heal Beam + Defib loadout
silver: Medium positioning behind tank but not in LOS
Light flanking but no team trade
diamond: Defib discipline — 1 wasted Defib per round
Build swap timing — too early or too late
ruby: Defib gaps — 1 timing miss per round

positioning: Is the Heavy mesh-shielding the front?
Is the Medium in LOS of Heavy for Heal Beam?
Is the Light flanking with Cloak / Grapple?
Is the team using multi-floor hold (vertical) on Cashout?
Is the team using destructible cover (Sledgehammer holes, RPG holes)?
Is the team anticipating third-team rotation?
Did the team commit to vault carry route or hesitate?
crosshair: Is the crosshair pre-aimed at head level on the angle?
Is the Heavy hipfire (close) or ADS (mid-range)?
Is the Medium AKM / FCAR for mid-range?
Is the Light SR-84 / V9S for range?
Is the player landing key shots (Heavy melee, Medium AKM, Light SR-84)?
Is the crosshair on priority target (Defibbing Medium, carrying Heavy)?
utility: Did the Heavy use Mesh Shield + RPG?
Did the Medium use Heal Beam + Defib?
Did the Light use Cloak + Grapple?
Was the team coordinated on multi-floor + entry seal?
Was Glitch Grenade used to disable Defib mid-fight?
Was Goo Gun used to seal entries?
Was RPG / C4 used for entry breach?
decisions: Did the team commit to Cashout or hesitate?
Did the team rotate to next vault on contest?
Did the team time third-party correctly?
Did the player engage 1v2+ without team backup?
Did the team coordinate Defib chain on wipe?
Did the team use destructible cover proactively?
Did the team save Mesh Shield + RPG for cap commit?

vocabulary: Cashout: Vault extracted at the Cashout statue, 30s extraction timer.
Vault: Locked safe containing the cash; carry to Cashout to extract.
Extract: Successful 30s Cashout completion.
Contest: Stealing the Cashout from another team.
Re-steal: Stealing the Cashout after it's been stolen from you.
Third-party: 4-team mode — third team waiting for two to engage, then steal.
Fourth-party: Final team waiting for chaos to end.
Build / Class: Light / Medium / Heavy.
Light: 150 HP, max mobility build.
Medium: 250 HP, healer/utility build.
Heavy: 350 HP, tank build.
Mesh Shield: Heavy's bullet-blocking front shield.
Heal Beam: Medium's sustained heal ability.
Defib / Defibrillator: Medium's revive teammate ability.
Cloak: Light's invisibility ability.
Grapple / Grappling Hook: Light's vertical mobility.
Glitch Grenade: Disables enemy abilities (including Defib).
Goo Gun: Heavy's wall-creating gun (seals entries, blocks bullets).
Pyro Grenade: Fire damage zone.
C4: Placeable explosive for breach / kills.
RPG: Heavy's rocket launcher.
Sledgehammer: Heavy's melee weapon, destroys walls.
Anti-Gravity Cube: Floats enemies / objects, denies cover.
Charge 'N' Slam: Heavy's leap attack.
Jump Pad: Medium's portable mobility.
APS Turret: Medium's auto-fire turret.
Stun Gun: Light's electric stun.
Vanishing Bomb: Light's exploding cloak grenade.
Sonar Grenade: Light's enemy reveal grenade.
AKM: Medium AR.
FCAR: Medium burst rifle.
Model 1887: Medium shotgun.
M60: Heavy LMG.
SA1216: Heavy auto-shotgun.
SR-84: Light sniper rifle.
V9S: Light pistol.
M11: Light SMG.
Healing channel: Defib reviving teammate (3s channel).
Multi-floor hold: Splitting team across multiple floors of Cashout building.
Carry route: Path the Heavy takes to extract vault.
Vault destruction: Heavy can destroy walls during vault carry for shortcut routes.
Pyro chain: Heavy goos entry, Medium Pyros the goo for fire damage.
Defib chain: Repeated Defib usage to maintain team in fight.
Reset hold: Pre-positioning for the inevitable wipe to Defib + re-engage.
Anti-third party: Pre-positioning for the third team arrival.
